title: MikroTik MT48-480095-11DG, power adapter 48V 0.95A, 45.6W, GPEN
description: Power adapter with output voltage 48V DC, maximum current 0.95A, total output power 45,6W and connector 5.5 / 2.1mm. The power source is part of the MikroTik GPEN concept, which provides all the benefits of GPON GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form .
